summary: Recent updates to the Media Capabilities in Firefox have focused on improving how the browser handles media decoding and performance. One significant change involves the **rejection of the WebRTC scalabilityMode** until a related fix is implemented, which ensures that video calls remain stable and efficient. Additionally, improvements were made to how the browser manages power efficiency during media decoding processes, ensuring a smoother experience for users, especially on battery-powered devices. These enhancements are essential for optimizing video performance and minimizing resource consumption, making media playback in Firefox both more efficient and effective.
